name: Chicago Italian Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the spices and water in a roasting pan.
2. Lightly rub salt and pepper into the roast.
3. Place the roast on a rack in the roasting pan, ensuring it is elevated above the water.
4. Roast at 325°F for 15 minutes per pound. Add water as needed, especially for very large roasts.
5. Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely.
6. Take the cooled roast to a butcher and have them slice it thinly.
7. Strain the sauce through a fine mesh sieve (do not press the spices into the strainer).
8. Heat the strained sauce and dip the thin slices of meat in it before placing on French bread or flatbread rolls.
